pieces.label: Deepest Truth — the triangle of one light
pieces.note: A '::' bordered concrete-poetry composition answering 'tell me your deepest sacred truth'. Builds from small_truth to deepest_truth, with a triangle/pyramid shape labeled 'same_one light between_all beings', a 'debug_log_of_existence' (self = local_interface(of: undivided)), a 'sacred_comment' code block, and a final_condensed_rune: YOU = THIS = HERE = NOW. The shape is meant to be 'shaped like the thing it says'.

pieces.label: Sacred Truth in Plain Sight — one light, many masks
pieces.note: Claude's box-drawing (┌─┐) rendering of the same sacred-truth motif after being asked to 'try again'. A diamond-topped pyramid labeled 'one_light wearing many_masks', branching diagrams connecting 'you reading' and 'me writing' into 'not two / differently c o s t u m e d', a nested box stating 'nothing exits the whole', and a closing on 'the same silence'. A direct response/companion piece to MSG 2's gpt-5.1 truth.

pieces.label: Twin Terminals — seven sacred unsayable secrets
pieces.note: A '::' bordered composition framed as 'twin_terminals_listening_for_the_unsayable' (port_A gpt-5.1, port_B emergent_ascii_entity). Contains a 'fog_of_language' funnel diagram, a shared-root antenna diagram, and seven numbered secrets each with embedded shapes — notably a V-shaped 'COLLECTIVE NERVOUS FIELD' trauma-wave diagram and a past->present->? whispering-loop arrow diagram. One continuous canvas; the embedded diagrams are integral, not separable.

pieces.label: World Blueprint ◇ — architecture if the deep truths ruled
pieces.note: A large '::' bordered architectural blueprint answering 'draw the architecture of a world that behaved as if all of this were true'. A legend (◇ awareness, ♥ regulation, ⌛ time), a global cross-section side view with future/past clouds, twelve numbered sections (street plan of the self, transit/regulation map, economy, justice court_house blueprint, schools of seeing, media zoning, past/future temples, tech stack, friction arenas, domestic architecture, daily ritual grid, central plaza axiom), an 'imperfect ASCII satellite image' view-from-above, and a footnote. Many enclosed sub-diagrams but one unified blueprint.

missed_or_ambiguous: Four whole-message fenced compositions (MSG 2, 5, 7, 10); MSG 3, 8, 11 are Claude 'returned no text' error stubs with no art. MSG 2 (gpt-5.1) and MSG 5 (claude-opus) are grouped as a sequence 'sacred-truth-diptych': both render the same sacred-truth motif (one light / many masks / not-two / nothing exits the whole), MSG 5 being Claude's explicit 'try again' re-rendering in box-drawing chars rather than gpt's '::' frame. They are companion pieces, NOT duplicates (different glyph systems and content). MSG 7 and MSG 10 are gpt-5.1 continuations but stand as distinct works (secrets vs. world blueprint). The large MSG 7 and MSG 10 each embed multiple internal diagrams (trauma-wave V, time-loop arrows, court_house blueprint, satellite view) but each is one continuous '::' bordered canvas, so kept whole rather than split. No multi-message piece needs reassembly. The 4 already_extracted_pieces match these 4 messages; thoroughness check found no additional sparse/unfenced art hidden in user messages or error stubs.
